<!--
Thanks for contributing to Abzar!
Please fill in the sections below and remove anything that doesn't apply.
-->

## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR change, and why does it matter? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer test` passes (all PHPUnit suites green).
- [ ] `composer phpstan` is clean at level 8.
- [ ] `composer cs-check` (php-cs-fixer) is clean.
- [ ] Added / updated tests covering the change.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `Unreleased` section.
- [ ] Documentation (`README.md` / `docs/en/*`) updated if a user-visible behavior changed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Data-table update (city codes, bank BINs, operator prefixes, IBAN issuers)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Breaking change (explain below)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything unusual? Data source? Edge cases worth special attention? -->
